positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical vintage botanical diagram featuring a central, flourishing celestial moonflower and surrounding detailed illustrations of cosmic elements: small, stylized constellations, floating geometric shapes (triangles, circles), and delicate stardust streams. The overall composition should resemble a vintage scientific blueprint, rendered in deep indigo, metallic gold, and muted sage green. High contrast, crisp lines, minimalist etching style, clean silhouettes, perfect symmetry. Perfect for apparel print on a natural fiber background. Vector-graphic quality, intricate line art, dot work, hyperdetailed.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blur, noise, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bokeh, ugly, amateur
